image:image.image:title: Afanyu Emmanuel — Software Developer Portfolio
image:image.image:caption: Portfolio and freelance service site of Afanyu Emmanuel, software developer in Kigali, Rwanda.

image:image.image:title: Zyra — Luxury Leather Goods Platform by Afanyu Emmanuel
image:image.image:caption: Full-stack platform digitising the lifecycle of a luxury leather goods brand. Built with React, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Docker.

image:image.image:title: DiaCare — Diabetes Care System by Afanyu Emmanuel
image:image.image:caption: Diabetes care management platform with real-time chat, SOS escalation, and role-based dashboards. Built with React, Spring Boot, WebSocket.

image:image.image:title: FAC Ltd — Trilingual Corporate Website by Afanyu Emmanuel
image:image.image:caption: Trilingual corporate website for a circular agribusiness in Rwanda. Built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS.

image:image.image:title: Muhinzi — Farm & Cooperative App UI/UX by Afanyu Emmanuel
image:image.image:caption: UI/UX design for a cooperative management and farm-to-market platform. Designed in Figma.
